text.title: Architect Mentoring Curriculum Worked Example
text.summary: One full worked example of the spec artefact end-to-end. Use as a calibration anchor when drafting new instances.

example.context: A cross-team services integration spec drafted from a sponsor brief and a constraint list. Three options surveyed, option B recommended, rollback plan included. Sponsor signed off without rework.
example.output: The artefact produced by the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml`, conforming to the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml`.

evaluation.criterion: Owner is a named human or role-with-rotation.

section.title: Notes
section.p: The smoke-test template (`templates/_smoke-test.*`) holds the canonical filled-in version. Treat it as the answer key during calibration.
